models.name: qwen2.5-vl:3b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR DESKTOP (8GB VRAM): Fast and accurate model for image analysis. Ideal compromise between speed and quality for PCs with 8GB VRAM (e.g., RTX 3060 Ti).

models.name: gemma4:e2b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR DESKTOP (8GB VRAM): The newest efficient multimodal model from Google. Excellent performance-to-memory ratio, suitable even for less powerful PCs.

models.name: glm-ocr:latest
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR DESKTOP (8GB VRAM): Specialist in extracting text from documents and images (OCR). Extremely fast and lightweight.

models.name: phi3:mini-instruct
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR DESKTOP (8GB VRAM): Small but very smart text model. Great choice for PCs with 8GB VRAM for text formatting in 'Enhanced Local AI' mode.

models.name: llava-qwen2:7b-instruct
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR LAPTOP (16GB VRAM): More powerful and accurate Vision model. Recommended for laptops and PCs with 12GB+ VRAM (e.g., Intel Arc 16GB).

models.name: mistral:7b-instruct
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR LAPTOP (16GB VRAM): Top-tier text model, ideal for formatting in 'Enhanced Local AI' mode on PCs with 12GB+ VRAM.

models.name: llama3:8b-instruct
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR LAPTOP (16GB VRAM): The newest and smartest model from Meta in this size category. A great alternative to Mistral for PCs with 12GB+ VRAM.
